mapper.update: UPDATE sys_notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
UPDATE sys_notification SET is_dismissed = 1, is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_dismissed = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, name FROM study_plan WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 2 AND is_deleted = 0
